title: Jipa's Tabacco Mod
description: Immersive consumable items with realistic mechanics and buffs.
body:
This mod adds a set of immersive consumable items that enhance roleplay and survival gameplay.
Players can find and use packs that provide individual items, which can then be combined with a lighter to trigger unique animations and grant temporary buffs such as Speed and Haste.

The system is designed to feel realistic while keeping the mechanics simple and fun.
Perfect for those who want a more atmospheric and roleplay-oriented experience in Minecraft.

How to use:

Right-click a pack to receive a consumable item.

Place the consumable in your main hand and the lighter in your offhand, then right-click to activate it.

Hold right-click with the active item to trigger a short animation and gain temporary buffs.

To recharge the lighter, hold a gas can in your main hand and right-click while the lighter is in your offhand.

Enjoy the immersive mechanics!

Updates are coming! This is a work in progress mod.
